overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a narrow, rocky forest trail at night, illuminated by a warm flashlight beam. The footage appears to be from a video game engine, featuring dense vegetation and large boulders lining the dirt path through a dark, enclosed natural environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest trail with rocky outcrops and dense undergrowth

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt path, illuminating the rocky trail ahead with a flashlight while navigating between boulders and vegetation

thick green bushes and undergrowth on the right side of the path
narrow winding dirt path with scattered small rocks and pebbles
large rock formation visible further down the trail on the right
loose stones and rocks scattered across the trail surface

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt trail through a dark forest environment, illuminated by a warm artificial light source. Large boulders and dense shrubs line both sides of the path, creating an enclosed, intimate atmosphere. The ground is uneven with scattered rocks, and the vegetation appears lush and green despite the nighttime setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a narrow forest trail that maintains a sense of claustrophobic intimacy throughout the journey. It begins by pushing steadily through a dark environment, where a warm artificial light source carves a path through the gloom. As the camera advances, the beam reveals an uneven dirt ground scattered with rocks and flanked by dense, lush green shrubs. The scene remains enclosed as the perspective glides past large boulders that line the edges of the path, deepening the feeling of being immersed in a secluded natural corridor.
